module.name: Agencies
module.description: Training programs for intelligence and law enforcement agencies.

agencies_cia_training.name: CIA Training
agencies_cia_training.description: Training programs for operatives focusing on intelligence gathering, tradecraft, and covert operations.

agencies_fbi_training.name: FBI Training
agencies_fbi_training.description: Federal Bureau of Investigation training on criminal investigations, profiling, and forensic analysis.

agencies_homeland_security.name: Homeland Security
agencies_homeland_security.description: National security training focused on terrorism prevention, border security, and emergency response.

agencies_interpol_training.name: Interpol Training
agencies_interpol_training.description: International law enforcement training covering cross-border criminal investigations and international law.

agencies_secret_service.name: Secret Service
agencies_secret_service.description: Training for protective services, financial crime investigations, and high-risk security operations.

agencies_cia_training_counterintelligenc.name: Counterintelligence Tactics
agencies_cia_training_counterintelligenc.description: Defensive measures to detect and neutralize enemy intelligence operations.

cards.title: Double Agent Identification
cards.description: Recognizing and handling infiltrators within an organization.
bulletpoints: Analyze inconsistencies in behavior
Cross-check mission details
Implement controlled misinformation
cards.summaryText: Expose double agents by flagging behavioral inconsistencies, cross-validating mission intel across trusted sources, and deploying controlled misinformation to confirm loyalties before threats escalate.

cards.title: Disinformation & Psychological Warfare
cards.description: Using controlled leaks and deceptive strategies to mislead adversaries.
bulletpoints: Seed false intelligence through secure channels
Use media manipulation to alter narratives
Employ psychological tactics to destabilize targets
cards.summaryText: Run disciplined disinformation operations by seeding false intelligence through hardened channels, steering media narratives with precision, and layering psychological pressure so adversaries chase fabricated threats.

agencies_cia_training_spy_tradecraft.name: Spy Tradecraft
agencies_cia_training_spy_tradecraft.description: Core espionage skills including deception, disguise, and clandestine communication.

cards.title: Legend Building
cards.description: Creating and maintaining false identities for deep cover operations.
bulletpoints: Develop detailed backstories
Memorize false credentials
Practice consistent mannerisms
cards.summaryText: Build a resilient cover identity by scripting deep backstories, memorizing forged credentials, and rehearsing consistent mannerisms so every interaction reinforces your legend under hostile scrutiny and withstands background probing.

cards.title: Dead Drops & Secure Communications
cards.description: Using hidden drop locations for safe, anonymous intelligence exchange.
bulletpoints: Select inconspicuous locations
Use one-time codes for retrieval
Ensure minimal exposure to counterintelligence
cards.summaryText: Master dead drop exchanges by choosing inconspicuous locations, pairing them with one-time retrieval codes, and choreographing low-visibility arrival windows so intelligence moves without exposing assets.

agencies_cia_training_undercover_surveil.name: Undercover Surveillance
agencies_cia_training_undercover_surveil.description: Training in covert observation, intelligence gathering, and tailing suspects without detection.

cards.title: Shadowing & Tail Techniques
cards.description: Following a target without raising suspicion.
bulletpoints: Maintain varying distances
Use multiple observers to avoid detection
Blend into urban and rural environments
cards.summaryText: Conduct discreet shadowing operations by varying distance and pace, rotating observers to break patterns, and blending into urban or rural backdrops so targets never sense persistent surveillance during extended operations.

cards.title: Electronic Surveillance Basics
cards.description: Using high-tech methods to track and monitor targets remotely.
bulletpoints: Deploy covert listening devices
Analyze movement patterns
Use encrypted channels for secure data transmission
cards.summaryText: Execute covert electronic surveillance by planting low-profile sensors, mapping movement patterns in real time, and relaying encrypted intelligence to command so remote monitoring stays invisible.

agencies_fbi_training_criminal_profiling.name: Criminal Profiling Methods
agencies_fbi_training_criminal_profiling.description: Techniques for analyzing behavior patterns and predicting criminal actions.

cards.title: Offender Typologies
cards.description: Classifying criminals based on behavior, motive, and crime patterns.
bulletpoints: Identify signature behaviors
Differentiate organized vs. disorganized offenders
Analyze crime scene characteristics
cards.summaryText: Profile offenders accurately by mapping signature behaviors, separating organized from disorganized patterns, and decoding crime scene indicators to forecast their next move.

cards.title: Threat Assessment & Risk Evaluation
cards.description: Evaluating potential threats based on historical behavioral data.
bulletpoints: Analyze suspect psychological markers
Apply structured risk assessment models
Identify pre-incident indicators of violence
cards.summaryText: Deliver precise threat assessments by dissecting psychological markers, running structured risk models, and flagging pre-incident signals before violence escalates.

agencies_fbi_training_cyber_fraud_detect.name: Cyber Fraud Detection
agencies_fbi_training_cyber_fraud_detect.description: Training in digital financial crime investigations and online fraud prevention.

cards.title: Digital Payment Fraud & Identity Theft
cards.description: Identifying and preventing fraudulent financial transactions online.
bulletpoints: Detect anomalies in payment transactions
Trace fraudulent cryptocurrency transfers
Use AI-based fraud detection tools
cards.summaryText: Uncover digital payment fraud by spotting anomalous transaction patterns, tracing crypto laundering paths, and deploying AI defenses before accounts are drained.

cards.title: Dark Web Financial Crime Investigations
cards.description: Investigating illegal financial activities on encrypted online marketplaces.
bulletpoints: Analyze blockchain transactions for illicit activity
Use OSINT to track dark web financial fraud
Understand money laundering techniques in cybercrime
cards.summaryText: Pursue dark web fraud rings by correlating blockchain trails, fusing OSINT leads, and decoding laundering techniques that hide illicit profits online.

agencies_fbi_training_forensic_analysis.name: Forensic Analysis
agencies_fbi_training_forensic_analysis.description: Applying scientific principles to criminal investigations and evidence evaluation.

cards.title: DNA & Fingerprint Analysis
cards.description: Extracting and matching biological evidence to confirm suspect identities.
bulletpoints: Collect and store DNA samples properly
Match fingerprint patterns using AFIS
Analyze trace DNA for forensic leads
cards.summaryText: Secure convictions by harvesting pristine DNA, matching fingerprints through AFIS, and exploiting trace biological evidence to tighten suspect attribution.

cards.title: Ballistics & Firearms Forensics
cards.description: Identifying weapons and ammunition used in crimes through forensic techniques.
bulletpoints: Analyze bullet striations and shell casings
Match firearm residues to specific guns
Utilize gunshot residue (GSR) testing
cards.summaryText: Reconstruct shootings by comparing bullet striations, linking residues to specific firearms, and validating trajectories with comprehensive ballistics forensics.

agencies_homeland_security_border_contro.name: Border Control Tactics
agencies_homeland_security_border_contro.description: Strategies for monitoring, securing, and managing border operations to prevent illegal activities.

cards.title: Human Trafficking Detection
cards.description: Identifying and intercepting human trafficking operations at national borders.
bulletpoints: Recognize signs of coerced and trafficked individuals
Utilize biometric and database matching for identity verification
Work with international agencies to disrupt trafficking networks
cards.summaryText: Disrupt human trafficking at the border by spotting coercion cues, validating identities through biometric systems, and syncing with international partners to dismantle the network.

cards.title: Drug Smuggling Prevention
cards.description: Detecting and intercepting illegal narcotics transported across borders.
bulletpoints: Identify concealment methods used in drug smuggling
Use canine units and chemical detection systems
Implement predictive analytics for trafficking patterns
cards.summaryText: Interdict drug smuggling by recognizing concealment tricks, pairing canine sweeps with chemical sensors, and using predictive analytics to preempt trafficking routes.

agencies_homeland_security_emergency_res.name: Emergency Response Drills
agencies_homeland_security_emergency_res.description: Preparing for rapid and coordinated responses to national security incidents and disasters.

cards.title: Mass Casualty Incident Response
cards.description: Managing large-scale emergencies, including terrorist attacks and natural disasters.
bulletpoints: Establish emergency triage protocols
Coordinate with medical and law enforcement agencies
Develop rapid deployment response plans
cards.summaryText: Command mass-casualty incidents by standing up triage lines fast, syncing medical and law enforcement assets, and executing prebuilt deployment plans under pressure.

cards.title: Active Shooter Response
cards.description: Strategies for neutralizing threats and securing civilians in mass attack scenarios.
bulletpoints: Implement ALERRT (Advanced Law Enforcement Rapid Response Training)
Establish immediate incident containment zones
Coordinate tactical entry and hostage rescue operations
cards.summaryText: Neutralize active shooters by applying ALERRT tactics, locking down containment zones, and orchestrating coordinated entries that prioritize civilian extraction.

agencies_homeland_security_terrorist_thr.name: Terrorist Threat Analysis
agencies_homeland_security_terrorist_thr.description: Identifying and assessing potential terrorist threats through intelligence and behavioral analysis.

cards.title: Identifying Radicalization Indicators
cards.description: Understanding behavioral and ideological markers associated with terrorist recruitment.
bulletpoints: Analyze social media activity for extremist rhetoric
Identify recruitment patterns and radicalization pipelines
Monitor changes in behavioral and financial activities
cards.summaryText: Spot early radicalization by scanning social feeds for extremist cues, mapping recruitment pipelines, and tracking behavioral or financial shifts before threats coagulate.

cards.title: Explosive Device Recognition
cards.description: Recognizing common IED components and understanding terrorist attack methodologies.
bulletpoints: Identify chemical precursors and suspicious purchases
Analyze past attack case studies for threat modeling
Understand bomb-making techniques used by terrorist cells
cards.summaryText: Detect improvised explosives by flagging precursor chemical buys, dissecting historical attack playbooks, and decoding assembly techniques favored by terrorist cells.

agencies_interpol_training_criminal_netw.name: Criminal Network Tracking
agencies_interpol_training_criminal_netw.description: Identifying and dismantling transnational organized crime groups and syndicates.

cards.title: Money Laundering & Financial Crime Networks
cards.description: Tracking illicit financial flows across international banking systems.
bulletpoints: Analyze suspicious transaction reports (STRs)
Identify shell companies used for money laundering
Coordinate with financial intelligence units (FIUs)
cards.summaryText: Trace global laundering webs by triaging STRs, piercing shell-company veils, and syncing with FIUs to choke off illicit cash flows.

cards.title: Drug Cartel & Human Trafficking Investigations
cards.description: Methods for infiltrating and dismantling international criminal syndicates.
bulletpoints: Utilize undercover operations in organized crime cases
Monitor encrypted communication channels
Analyze trafficking routes and logistics networks
cards.summaryText: Crack transnational cartels by embedding undercover assets, surveilling encrypted comms, and mapping trafficking logistics to collapse their networks.

agencies_interpol_training_cross_border_.name: Cross-Border Smuggling Cases
agencies_interpol_training_cross_border_.description: Investigative strategies for combating smuggling of weapons, narcotics, and contraband.

cards.title: Contraband Detection & Seizure Operations
cards.description: Identifying hidden smuggling compartments in vehicles, cargo, and luggage.
bulletpoints: Use advanced scanning and X-ray technologies
Train in physical search methods for hidden compartments
Analyze smuggling patterns based on historical data
cards.summaryText: Seize contraband by pairing advanced scanning tech with meticulous manual searches and mining past cases for emerging concealment patterns.

cards.title: Covert Border Surveillance & Intelligence Sharing
cards.description: Monitoring border crossings for illegal smuggling activities.
bulletpoints: Deploy real-time border surveillance technologies
Coordinate intelligence-sharing with neighboring countries
Implement tracking methods for smuggling convoys
cards.summaryText: Thwart cross-border smuggling by deploying real-time surveillance, fusing partner intel, and tracking convoy movements before they vanish.

agencies_interpol_training_international.name: International Law Basics
agencies_interpol_training_international.description: Fundamental principles of international law, treaties, and jurisdictional challenges.

cards.title: Treaty Enforcement & International Agreements
cards.description: Understanding the role of treaties and agreements in international criminal law.
bulletpoints: Analyze key international legal agreements
Understand the role of the United Nations in enforcement
Coordinate investigations across multiple jurisdictions
cards.summaryText: Enforce cross-border cases by interpreting cornerstone treaties, leveraging UN mechanisms, and aligning multinational investigators under shared mandates.

cards.title: Extradition Laws & Procedures
cards.description: Mechanisms for requesting and executing extraditions across borders.
bulletpoints: Understand bilateral and multilateral extradition treaties
Navigate legal challenges in high-profile extraditions
Identify cases where diplomatic immunity applies
cards.summaryText: Execute airtight extraditions by mastering treaty frameworks, countering defense obstacles, and flagging immunity claims before they derail custody transfers.

agencies_secret_service_emergency_evasio.name: Emergency Evasion Maneuvers
agencies_secret_service_emergency_evasio.description: High-speed escape and defensive driving techniques for emergency situations.

cards.title: High-Speed Escape Drills
cards.description: Executing rapid escape maneuvers to evade potential threats.
bulletpoints: Perform J-turns, PIT maneuvers, and evasive acceleration techniques
Utilize cover and concealment during high-risk pursuits
React dynamically to hostile vehicle threats
cards.summaryText: Rip through high-speed escape drills by chaining J-turns, exploiting cover, and adapting instantly to hostile vehicles to pull principals out of danger.

cards.title: Defensive Countermeasures in Close Quarters
cards.description: Applying defensive techniques in confined and high-stress situations.
bulletpoints: Utilize emergency barricading strategies
Evade attackers using close-quarters movement
Deploy tactical response measures to neutralize immediate threats
cards.summaryText: Survive close-quarter ambushes by locking down barricades, slipping attackers with agile footwork, and delivering decisive countermeasures before they regain initiative.

agencies_secret_service_financial_fraud_.name: Financial Fraud Detection
agencies_secret_service_financial_fraud_.description: Investigating fraudulent financial transactions and identifying money laundering activities.

cards.title: Counterfeit Currency Detection
cards.description: Techniques for identifying and intercepting counterfeit currency.
bulletpoints: Analyze security features in legal tender
Use UV scanning and microprint detection techniques
Track illegal printing operations and distribution networks
cards.summaryText: Stop counterfeit cash by scrutinizing security features, wielding UV and microprint tools, and mapping illicit printing pipelines before money hits circulation.

cards.title: Forensic Accounting Investigations
cards.description: Tracing illicit financial activities through forensic auditing.
bulletpoints: Analyze financial statements for irregularities
Identify shell companies and fraudulent bookkeeping
Work with international agencies on cross-border fraud cases
cards.summaryText: Expose hidden fraud by dissecting financial statements, unraveling shell-company ledgers, and partnering with global teams to follow dirty money.

agencies_secret_service_protective_servi.name: Protective Service Tactics
agencies_secret_service_protective_servi.description: Strategies and techniques for VIP and dignitary protection in high-risk environments.

cards.title: Advance Security Planning
cards.description: Developing detailed security protocols and contingency plans before a protective mission.
bulletpoints: Conduct site assessments and vulnerability analyses
Plan primary and secondary evacuation routes
Coordinate security teams for seamless operations
cards.summaryText: Lock in advance security plans by vetting sites, plotting redundant escape routes, and synchronizing protection teams before the principal arrives.

cards.title: Protective Formation Drills
cards.description: Executing defensive formations and response tactics during a live security threat.
bulletpoints: Utilize diamond and wedge formations for optimal coverage
React dynamically to evolving threats
Manage crowd control and civilian safety under pressure
cards.summaryText: Shield principals in motion by refining diamond and wedge formations, reacting fluidly to threats, and steering crowds without breaking protective coverage.
